attributes.name: Beat Maker Studio Card
attributes.summary: The BeatMakerCard constitutes an interactive drum machine and pattern sequencer for creating and managing rhythm patterns. It offers a comprehensive interface for selecting drum kits, adjusting tempo (BPM), swing, and volume controls, and designing rhythmic patterns across multiple instruments via a 16-step sequencer grid. The primary purpose is to enable users to compose, visualize, and playback custom drum patterns dynamically, utilizing real-time sound synthesis with configurable sound parameters, pattern presets, and kit management. It supports pattern saving/loading, kit selection, and pattern randomization, providing an immersive environment for music creation within a stylized, thematically themed UI.
